CSS-Wert wie 0.8125rem oder 13px. Leer =: CSS value like 0.8125rem or 13px. Empty = default.
CSS-Wert wie 0.9375rem oder 15px. Leer =: CSS value like 0.9375rem or 15px. Empty = default.
Datei-Uploads können schädliche Dateien: File uploads can contain harmful files. The base plugin checks extension and file type; virus scanning and encrypted storage are provided by the Security add-on.
Der Bereich «Rückmeldung» am Ende des Fo: The “Feedback” area at the end of the form appears after successful submission without a follow-up page, replacing the form. Left empty, the form shows the standard message. Placeholders in the text: {{fieldname}} (technical field name).
Dieser Feldname existiert in diesem Form: This field name already exists in this form. Duplicate the field once and delete the original – a new name will be assigned.
Dieser Inhalt ersetzt nach erfolgreichem: This content replaces the form after successful submission if no follow-up page is selected. Placeholders: {{fieldname}}; optionally {{label_fieldname}} (e.g. {{label_email}}).
Eindeutige Kennung dieses Formulars (bei: Unique identifier of this form (new when the form block is duplicated). Submissions and payload evaluation are always tied to this ID.
Eingaben werden im Browser der Besucheri: Entries are cached in the visitor's browser and restored automatically on the next visit. Drafts expire after 7 days.
Erscheint als Legende unter dem Feld, wi: Appears as a caption below the field, like an image caption.
Farben und Karte kommen vollständig aus: Colours and card come entirely from the theme. Custom form colours are only available in the light, dark or automatic modes.
Feste From-Adresse für diese Benachricht: Fixed From address for this notification (not taken from the form). Invalid or empty → admin email.
Im Farbmodus «Theme» kommen alle Farben: In the “Theme” colour mode all colours come from the theme. Field colours are available in the light, dark or automatic modes (Styles tab of the form block).
Keine Felder gefunden. Lege zuerst Felde: No fields found. First create fields in the form outside this feedback area.
Label: Label
Leer = Standardbetreff. Platzhalter: {{f: Empty = default subject. Placeholders: {{fieldname}} and {{label_fieldname}} (technical field name).
Leer lassen für die Mitte zwischen Min u: Leave empty for the midpoint between min and max.
Leer lassen für keinen Startwert. Format: Leave empty for no initial value. Format: HH:MM (24-hour), e.g. 09:30.
Leave empty for no initial value. Format: YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. 2026-05-10.
Leave empty for no initial value. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm (local), e.g. 2026-05-10T14:00.
Liste der technischen Feldnamen (POST-Na: List of technical field names (POST name). After selection, the value placeholder {{fieldname}} is inserted here as a paragraph.
Markiert das Feld als vertraulich. Maski: Marks the field as confidential. Masking and encryption are handled by the Security add-on, if installed. The value remains visible when sent by email.
Nichts gewählt = alle sicheren Standardt: Nothing selected = all safe standard types. Dangerous types (e.g. programs, scripts) are always blocked by the server.
Nur für die Backend-Übersicht und den St: Only for the backend overview and the default email subject (if no custom subject is set); not displayed in the form.
Nur im Editor und in der Eintrags-Übersi: Only visible in the editor and the entries overview; does not appear in the form.
Optional. Leer = Name der Website. Platz: Optional. Empty = site name. Placeholders: {{fieldname}} and {{label_fieldname}} (technical field name).
Steuert, ob auf diesem Formular ein CAPT: Controls whether a CAPTCHA appears on this form. Prerequisite: the CAPTCHA is globally enabled and configured under “Security & Settings”.
Wenn aktiv, wird der oben gesetzte Wert: If active, the value set above is applied server-side on submission. Values from the browser are ignored (protection against manipulation).
Wird automatisch vergeben und bleibt sta: Assigned automatically and stays stable. Serves as the column in the CSV export and as the placeholder in the feedback block: {{fieldname}}.
Wählst du ein E-Mail-Feld, wird dessen A: If you choose an email field, its address is set as the reply-to address – “Reply” then goes straight to the sender. The technical sender always remains an address of your website; a foreign From would be rejected by many mail servers as forgery (SPF/DKIM/DMARC).
Öffentlich sichtbare Seite. Ohne Auswahl: Publicly visible page. Without a selection the visitor stays on the form page (notice at the top).
